product_overview: A simple to-do web app that lets users load their task list, add new tasks, mark tasks complete or incomplete, and delete tasks. The interface also shows user-facing error messages when actions fail.
core_goals: View the current list of todos on app load
Add new todo items to the list
Mark todo items as completed or incomplete
Delete todo items from the list
See clear error messages when a user action cannot be completed

features.name: Load todos on app start
features.description: When the app opens, the current todos are fetched and displayed automatically.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Observe the app loading state -> See the todo list populate

features.name: Create a new todo
features.description: Users can enter text for a new task and add it to the list.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Type a todo description -> Submit the new todo -> See the new item appear in the list
Navigate to / -> Leave the todo text empty or whitespace-only -> Submit the new todo -> See no new item added

features.name: Update todo completion status
features.description: Users can mark an existing todo as complete or incomplete.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Select a todo's completion control -> See the todo's completed state change

features.name: Delete a todo
features.description: Users can remove an existing todo from the list.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Select a todo for removal -> See the todo disappear from the list
Navigate to / -> Select a todo for removal -> See an error message appear

features.name: View and retry error states
features.description: The app displays error messages when an operation fails, and users can try the action again.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Trigger an operation error through your own input or action -> See an error message displayed at the top of the page -> Retry the action

routes.description: Main Todo application page with task management interface
REST API endpoint for CRUD operations on todos
REST API endpoint for individual todo operations

features.name: Fetch todos on app load
features.description: Retrieve all todos from the database when application starts

features.name: Create new todo
features.description: Add a new todo item with text validation
user_interactions: Type todo text in input field
New todo appears in the list

api_calls.response: { id: string, text: string, completed: boolean }

features.name: Toggle todo completion status
features.description: Mark a todo as completed or incomplete
user_interactions: Click checkbox next to a todo item

api_calls.response: { id: string, text: string, completed: boolean }

features.name: Delete todo
features.description: Remove a todo item from the list
user_interactions: Click delete button next to a todo
Todo is removed from the list
Error message displays if deletion fails

features.name: Error handling and display
features.description: Display error messages when API operations fail
user_interactions: Error message displays at top of page

known_limitations.issue: DELETE endpoint uses todos.remove() instead of todos.splice()
known_limitations.impact: Delete operations throw TypeError and fail on valid IDs. Expected behavior after fix requires using splice(todoIndex, 1) to properly remove todos from array.
Database operations may have race conditions under concurrent load. Recommended to migrate to proper database for production.
Todo text is not sanitized, potential XSS vulnerability if todo text is later displayed without escaping.
